message:
test(doom, canvas-adapters): add 40 unit tests across five modules

- bsp.rs: 6 tests for BSP traversal (empty map, single subsector,
  two-subsector ordering, early exit, viewer side selection)
- player.rs: 8 tests for thrust, running multiplier, directional
  movement, yaw wrapping, spawn reset, bob offset
- wad.rs: 8 tests for PWAD header, case-insensitive lookup,
  find_lump_after, lump_by_name error, vertex parsing, bad directory
- canvas_adapters.rs: 18 tests for ping_pong, lerp_color, gradient,
  ordered_pair, ball_count quality tiers, thresholds, adapter APIs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
